prompts.name: Sunrise
prompts.text: Set the scene at sunrise with soft golden light, fresh atmosphere, long shadows, and gentle morning color.

prompts.name: Early Morning
prompts.text: Set the scene in early morning with cool fresh light, quiet surroundings, and a clean start-of-day feeling.

prompts.name: Late Morning
prompts.text: Set the scene in late morning with bright but soft daylight, natural color, and calm clarity.

prompts.name: Midday
prompts.text: Set the scene at midday with strong clear daylight, vivid color, and high visibility.

prompts.name: Afternoon
prompts.text: Set the scene in the afternoon with warm natural light, comfortable contrast, and relaxed daytime energy.

prompts.name: Golden Hour
prompts.text: Set the scene during golden hour with warm sunlight, soft highlights, and cinematic amber tones.

prompts.name: Sunset
prompts.text: Set the scene at sunset with rich sky colors, warm fading light, and gentle evening atmosphere.

prompts.name: Dusk
prompts.text: Set the scene at dusk with fading twilight, cool blue shadows, and a quiet transitional mood.

prompts.name: Blue Hour
prompts.text: Set the scene during blue hour with deep cool tones, soft ambient light, and elegant evening atmosphere.

prompts.name: Night
prompts.text: Set the scene at night with controlled darkness, readable subject lighting, and calm nighttime mood.

prompts.name: Midnight
prompts.text: Set the scene at midnight with deep shadows, moonlight, quiet atmosphere, and strong mood.

prompts.name: Rainy Evening
prompts.text: Set the scene during a rainy evening with diffused light, wet reflections, and cozy muted atmosphere.

prompts.name: Snowy Morning
prompts.text: Set the scene during a snowy morning with soft white light, cold air, and quiet winter stillness.

prompts.name: Neon Night
prompts.text: Set the scene at neon-lit night with colorful artificial light, reflective surfaces, and stylish urban mood.

prompts.name: Candlelit Night
prompts.text: Set the scene at night lit by candles, with warm glow, soft falloff, and intimate atmosphere.
